label: QC Check
prompt: Run a full QC check on the current model: count warnings, check naming conventions, find unused families, and give a health score.

label: MEP Summary
prompt: Give me a summary of all MEP systems: pipe count, duct count, flow rates, and any issues.

label: Tag All Pipes
prompt: Tag all untagged pipes in the current view.

label: Count Elements
prompt: Count all elements in the current view grouped by category.

label: Color by System
prompt: Color all MEP elements in the current view by system name.

label: Export to CSV
prompt: Export all {category} elements with parameters {param1}, {param2} to CSV.

label: Find Clashes
prompt: Check for clashes between ducts and structural framing in the current model.

label: Model Health
prompt: Run audit_model_standards and give me the overall model health score.
